states.name: Callen
states.title: Dragon Bride
states.description: "W-Well, say something, you fool!" Callen demands, puffing up her blushing cheeks. "Honestly, and here I spent so much time on dressing up—H-Hey, I am not being vain! And I did not do it for you, I did it for myself—" She flounders for a minute, before calming herself down. "Hmpf, forget it. Now, come here already!"

states.name: Callen
states.title: Dragon Bride
states.description:
"Hohoho, what is it? You turned awfully red all of a sudden. Has my outstanding beauty rendered you speechless?" Eager to get a reaction, Callen attempts to strike an alluring pose on the piano bench. However, her unathletic body struggles to keep up and she promptly loses her balance. 
"Eeeek! H-Hey! What are you gawking at? Help me up, you idiot!"

states.name: Callen
states.title: Dragon Bride
states.description:
Burdened by the unforgivable crime of her youth, she never thought she had the right to be happy; even though everyone around her wished her well, she could never show herself the same courtesy. But at least in her dreams, whenever she falls asleep on her lab desk...
"You say you can make me happy? If so, let us be together until the end of time."
